blocks.content:
Congratulations on completing this path! Job well done!

We hope you've enjoyed traveling with us as you:

- Opened the silence creation form
- Set a start time and duration
- Added label matchers to select alerts
- Verified affected instances and submitted the silence

---

### More to explore (optional)

Read more about how you can:

- [Create and manage silences](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana/latest/alerting/configure-notifications/create-silence/)
- [Use mute timings for recurring windows](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana/latest/alerting/configure-notifications/mute-timings/)

---

### Related paths

Consider taking the following path next:

- [Create your first alert rule - query](https://grafana.com/docs/learning-paths/alerting-first-rule-query/)
